title: Oblivion
description: Whenever you play a card, this enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
smart_description: Whenever you play a card, this enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
notes: This power is removed at the end of the player's turn. The power tracks Doom amounts per card played and applies them to the enemy after each card resolves.
